installation_requirements.mounting: Track-mounted, plugs connect to receptacles located at ends of tracks only
installation_requirements.welding_spec: AWS E-70XX electrodes or E-70TI Code 5.3 flux core wire only

specifications.hydraulic_safety_systems: Automatic, all position (flow limiting valve at each cylinder)
electrical_features: Class I - Div 2 rated on/off manual starter with overload protection
Class I - Div 2 rated locking plug

features: Track-mounted operation on four-post lift runways
Two hydraulic cylinders with direct drive
Automatic all-position hydraulic safety system with flow limiting valves at each cylinder
Spring loaded steel wheels with needle bearings (4 per jacking beam)
Class I - Div 2 rated electrical components
Adjustable width between lifting pads: 10.5 inches min to 47.75 inches max
Maximum pad height of 19.5 inches with 10-inch adaptor

parts_list.description: Electric/Hydraulic Jacking Beam rated 23,000 lbs for TR-33
Electric/Hydraulic Jacking Beam rated 24,500 lbs for TR-35
Electric/Hydraulic Jacking Beam rated 35,000 lbs for TR-50
Electric/Hydraulic Jacking Beam rated 50,000 lbs for TR-75

certifications: Tested and certified by a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL)
Meets U.L. Standard 201 for Garage Equipment
Meets ANSI/ALI ALCTV-2011 for Automotive Lift Construction
ALI/ETL Certified - Independently Tested and Validated
safety_features: Flow limiting valve at each cylinder
Class I - Div 2 rated on/off manual starter with overload protection
Class I - Div 2 rated locking plug
NRTL certified to UL 201 and ANSI/ALI ALCTV-2011
notes: Total aggregate capacity of any combination of jacking beams cannot exceed rated capacity of lift
Confidential document - property of Mohawk Resources Ltd.
Mohawk Resources Ltd. reserves the right to make changes without notice
Revision E: ALI verification logo change (12/15)

Standard equipment includes: (2) 5-inch frame adaptors (stackable), (2) 7.5-inch frame adaptors (stackable), (2) 10-inch frame adaptors (stackable), (2) teeth lifting pads, (2) yoke lifting pads for use with axles
Manufacturer: Mohawk Resources Ltd., P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Avenue, Amsterdam, NY 12010
